title: Tyto (Bacta Company)
content:
{{Top|ca|leg|notoc=1}} {{Youmay|the [[Bacta Company]] [[Captain/Legends|captain]] nicknamed "Tyto"|the [[Tyto|Aiwha Squad commando called Tyto]]}} {{Character |type=Galactic Republic |image= |name=Tyto
CT-52/89-9204 |homeworld=[[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]]{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] ([[Cloning/Legends|clone]]) |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns= |donor=[[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]{{DB|organization|clonetroopers|clone troopers}} |height=1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families= |parents= |partners= |siblings= |children= |affiliation=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] **[[Bacta Company]] |masters= |apprentices= }} '''Tyto''', designated '''CT-52/89-9204''', was one of the many [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] of [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]]—a 1.83 [[Meter/Legends|meter]]–tall [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]]—created on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] for service in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]]. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], Tyto served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as a [[Clone Captain/Legends|clone trooper captain]] in command of [[Bacta Company]], a force of four [[Platoon/Legends|platoons]] made up of a total of one hundred forty-four [[Troop/Legends|troops]]. Bacta Company was part of the [[Hawkbat Battalion]] in the [[327th Star Corps/Legends|327th Star Corps]], which was, in turn, part of the [[7th Legion]] in the [[101st Regiment]] of the [[Systems Army Alpha]]'s [[Second Army|2nd Sector Army]]. ==Behind the scenes== Tyto was first mentioned in "[[Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic]]," an article written by [[Karen Traviss]] and [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]] and published in [[Star Wars Insider 84|''Star Wars Insider'' 84]] in [[September]] of [[2005]]. ==Sources== *{{InsiderCite|84|Guide to the Grand Army of the Republic}} {{1stm}} *{{CSWECite|III||Tyto, Captain}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=CT-52/89-9204 |pl=CT-52/89-9204 }} [[Category:Clone trooper captains]] [[Category:Individuals with unspecified pronouns]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Members of the 327th Star Corps]] [[Category:Members of Bacta Company]]
